title: Photometric filter passband manifest
$comment: Defines a photometric passband (filter) used by one or more catalogs. Provides a stable identifier and links to authoritative transmission profiles (e.g. SVO).

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier (e.g. 'csp-dr3-b', 'ztf-g'). Must be survey-prefixed to avoid collisions.

survey.description: The survey or instrument that owns this filter passband.

magnitude_system.description: The calibration reference system for this filter.

svo_id.description: Link to the SVO Filter Profile Service identifier (e.g. 'Carnegie/CSP.B').

authority.description: The source of the filter profile (e.g. a specific paper or archive).
